## Description
Explain the modifications, bugs addressed, or new architecture features proposed.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (e.g. updating ARCHITECTURE.md or README.md)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated corresponding files: `CHANGELOG.md`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`, `API.md` if applicable.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or compiler errors.
- [ ] I have run local validation tests and verify they pass.
